title: Psychotria macrochlamys
intro: Psychotria macrochlamys, also known as Temulawak, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria macrochlamys include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Psychotria macrochlamys is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea to utilize its health benefits.
